creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 167842
shar with new port textproc/rubygem-html-pipeline1

Hello,

attached a new port textproc/rubygem-html-pipeline1. We already have a port textproc/rubygem-html-pipeline, which currently contains version 2.x. Sadly version 1.x and 2.x are not compatible and the new port www/gitlab currently needs 1.x.

Therefore i've created this new port. Is should just last as long as GitLab needs the old version and will be removed after that.

poudriere build fine for:
9.3 amd + i386
10.1 amd + i386
10.2 amd + i386
11-current r293820 amd + i386

portlint is also fine.

And i did a runtime test to verify that the port is loadable and usable!

Greetings,
Torsten
